overview: WanderAssist is a professional travel planning and booking app — discover destinations, generate personalized itineraries, select flights and hotels, track favorites, manage budgets, and complete bookings all in one place.
features: Favorites with GSAP heart animation — save and revisit your favorite plans
Consistent booking amounts across summary, payment, confirmation, and history
Flight seat grid in correct A B C | D E F order with departure city selection and dynamic filtering
Image fallback handling — no broken images anywhere in the app
Multi-step travel wizard for Solo, Friends, Family, and Corporate trips
Budget planner with destination finder and expense tracker
Animated login page with globe and orbiting plane
Senior citizen tours with dedicated booking flow
